reviews.review_description: Can't wait for the new update when do it come out I feel like order for a game like this to work you got to be a lot of sea creatures in the ocean too explore and maybe some activities a lot of different kind of monsters that interact with the ship like sharks will try to charge at your ship if you get too close to them some of them I will try to come at you and come flowing towards it till they curious some manatees Kay's with stuff going on inside the caves electric eels starfish that moves on a bed of the floor and still just laying there and some of those fishes that got the sharp teeth that be stuck floating up but stuck to the sea bed  how about some prehistoric creatures that'd be cool or sometimes when you come out the water it be a storm going on on top and it's night time sharks that will try to attack the ship octopus moving around big ones small ones clams muscles floating past clams floating past or moving around the bed silverfish that want big one day everybody wants about when dangerous come in and come to the surface different types of lobsters and crabs blue crabs giant lobsters giant squids giant octopuses grotesque creature that the bottom of the sea The ones that be glowing in the dark dolphins that react to your ship when they come to it looking inside trying to see you I feel realistic too RV on the surface you'll see dolphins jumping out of the water and orchid wells and swimming past maybe some sea lions on the iceberg seagulls passing by

It feels really good to float around and explore in your reliable little ship. The vibe of exploring the ocean in your ship while peaceful ambient music is playing is unrivaled. Unfortunately, I heard the game is no longer being updated, but if you catch this game on sale, I think it's worth $5 for the experience. It would be really cool if some other dev came along and made a game similar and added more things to make it like a Subnautica for standalone.

Great app I feel like I’m back in Hawaii on the Submarine we took a ride out how do you get to drive your own submarine so much  tto see 👍👍👍👍👍



I have a problem with submarine. You can only go one place and I have no way to any of the others. I clicked on them and I’m still in the one place it’s still a great game. I wish I could go to The Different places. Thank you. Hope you can fix it.  ?
￼￼￼
So relaxing and fun. Just wish there was more to see. Please developers continue to update. I like it but could be even better!
Awesome, fun and a good learning experience. Worth having.
Cool app and worth having.

Definitely has potential. I noticed people said that and gave recommendations 3 years ago, but nothing has been updated. Clearly no intentions of continuing development so I'm gonna get a refund. Missed opportunity. So sad devs😕

This is a great little exsperiance 
And for the price you just can't moan.
Graphics are very good and a relaxing exsperiance. 
So much could be done with this game.
The only thing that disappointed me is the Titanic broken in half  you start at the port ( the front) but I could not find the stern ( the back)

I like this simulator. Nice to explore to ocean in my own sub. I had fun. The red button needs some illumination so I can find it. I was viewing the titanic when I pressed it and discovered it turned off the lights. All of them. I was unable to locate the button. Also the radar would be great when it works. I went looking for the back half of the ship and got lost. Lol. Looking forward to the updates as they come out. Im hoping a lot more historical wrecks will be added like the USS Oriskany carrier off florida, or the USS Hornet and other ships. This simulation has a ton of possibilities.

Radar does not work. Hitting light button turns off all lights. It's hard to turn back on. Only a small portion of Titanic is viewable. The game needs more sites to see. The game has not been updated since 2021.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
The game was last updated on September 20, 2023. We've added the Titanic, Monterey, and Corals maps. We plan to update the game in the future.

reviews.review_description:
I find it quite beautiful : like the sounds, atmosphere, I like the calm it exudes
But I see no english, difficult to know vwhere to click on the options (and there is few option however)

this is exactly what i wanted for a while but i couldn’t find. very interesting and scary like going to the titanic but i suggest that the creators add the mariana drench or how ever you spell it and a lot of different monsters or even the bermuda triangle would be interesting to explore.😁😁😁

I like the titanic area but can you add the 

Mariana trench
More famose ship wrecks
Lockness monster and other creaturs
What  a beautiful experience every time I use this experience I sleep beautifully at night really calming and fabulous x
I like this game but it needs more maps and places

Exactly the sort of thing I have been looking for on the Quest. Nice experience, sort of like Outer Wilds when you go under the ocean. Looking forward to/hopefully more stuff being included but am enjoying the experience so far. Suggestion (not a request!): more toggles in cockpit (could control lights, beams, music on or off). I personally like not having to worry about oxygen so hopefully that stays optional. Looking forward to seeing this progress!

I love the idea and execution so far, and I see lots of potential for further improvements,  but the question is -as is the case for many games nowadays- will the full potential ever be reached? Stuff that needs to be improved in short term : better steering (when steering right or left, the cockpit keeps rotating until you're facing the side wall of the cockpit or even the back), the locations still feel very empty and a bit flat, overall graphics should be improved/more detail (I played on high settings), and re-centering your view makes you sit too close to the virtual steering joystick so it's better to lean a bit forward when re-centering. Longer term added value : some information about the location while moving around, more locations, choice of music,.. Hope to see future updates!

This game is really good to jump into and relax. My only issue is that there isn't much to explore. The landscape is practically the same no matter where you go. It would be amazing if there were ravines, underwater volcanoes, etc... to explore. A survival mode with hostile animals could also be really fun.

Really great underwater experience. Best with locked camera mode on, a setting which is rather hidden away.

Exploring some underwater caves would be a great addition.
Update: found a mini cave in the coral environment, nice.  

Update: love the auto dive/surface switch.

Clearly it's still early access, which ends up meaning that the world feels a little empty after a while. That being said, this is an extremely cool experience and absolutely worth the price of admission. 

There's something very peaceful about just setting it at five knots and just cruising. Can't wait to see what else gets added over time.

I am enjoying this game so much. The graphics are
excellent and I love all the fish and scenery. The experience is so immersive and feels like I’m in
a real submarine exploring all around. Great job to the developers of this game and hope you add more
fish and locations. I also enjoy the music as well.This is definitely a 5 stars and hope many more people experience this.
Again, thanks for bringing this experience to
Oculus quest.

But can you add a tutorial on how to operate/drive the submarine and it keeps spinning around in circles sometimes which is kind of annoying, please fix. is it possible to add octopuses and different underwater environments etc?

developer_response.body:
Hi,

The game is in early access. We plan to add more fishes including octopus. The controls are simple. Push the control lever on your right side. Use the joystick in front of you to control the submarine. By the way there is squid in "The Deep" map if you ascend.

reviews.review_description: Stunning 😍
But could you add something like the Mariana Trench?
￼ buttons do not work

This game is amazing, and I recommend the highest quality settings. And I do have some recommendations for the Developers. You guys should add a way to examine the fish species and get a very small description of it example where it lives, it's diet, and the year was discovered. And since you plan on adding more fish species you should add a reward for if you examine everyone. Like a secret map or something. Anyway I love this game and it has so much potential and I can't wait to see where it goes best $10 I ever spent on a video game. P. S. You don't have to listen to me it's your game but this has a lot of crazy potential.
Have this game a long time now but i don't Understand everything is japen for me
